src/main/java/com/rsc/aicode/AiCodeAppli.general_idea: Enable automatic scanning of MyBatis mapper interfaces in the specified package.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new runtime environment.
Add the MyBatis-Flex Spring Boot 3 starter dependency to enable ORM functionality compatible with the new stack.
Add the MyBatis-Flex code generator dependency to support automated entity and mapper generation.
Explicitly add HikariCP as a database connection pool dependency.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Added the MySQL JDBC driver class name to the datasource configuration.
Added the JDBC URL pointing to the local MySQL database 'ai_code'.
Added the database username 'root' to the datasource configuration.
Added the database password '123456' to the datasource configuration.
